info.title: Command line tool for watching and interpreting F# projects

arguments.name: --WATCH
arguments.description: Watch the source files of the project for changes

arguments.name: --WEBHOOK:<URL
arguments.description: Send the JSON-encoded contents of the PortaCode to the webhook

arguments.name: --EVAL
arguments.description: Evaluate the contents using the interpreter after each update

arguments.name: --LIVECHECKSONLY
arguments.description: (Experimental) Only evaluate declarations with a LiveCheck attribute

arguments.name: THIS USES ON-DEMAND EXECUTION SEMANTICS FOR TOP-LEVEL DECLARATIONS
--WRITEINFO
arguments.description: (Experimental) Write an info file based on results of evaluation

arguments.name: --VSHACK
arguments.description: (Experimental) Watch for .fsharp/foo.fsx.edit files and use the contents of those

arguments.name: OTHER-ARGS
arguments.description: All other args are assumed to be extra F# command line arguments
